file_name: Exact Sciences - Third-party questionnaire template - January 2026_3.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Abbott and Exact Sciences are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Abbott and/or Exact Sciences.
